info.title: Kutoot API Documentation
info.description: Kutoot API — Campaigns, Coupons, Subscriptions, Stamps, and more. Authenticate via Sanctum Bearer tokens obtained through the OTP login flow.

post.description:
Send a one-time password to the user's email or mobile number.
If the user doesn't exist, a new account is created automatically.
Verify the OTP and receive a Sanctum bearer token for subsequent API requests.

get.description: Returns the currently authenticated user with their subscription and primary campaign.

Returns a paginated list of active campaigns. When authenticated, includes
eligibility info based on the user's subscription plan.

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific campaign including stamp configuration.
Returns the bounty meter data for a campaign including commission progress and stamp progress.

Returns a paginated list of active coupons. Includes eligibility info based
on the user's subscription plan.

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific coupon.

post.description:
Initiates a coupon redemption by creating a Razorpay order. The client must
complete the payment using the returned order details, then call verify-payment.

Verifies the Razorpay payment for a coupon redemption. On success, the coupon
is redeemed and stamps are awarded.

get.description:
Returns the user's dashboard data including subscription plan info,
stamp statistics, coupon usage, and eligible campaigns.
Returns a paginated list of merchant locations with optional search and filters.

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile with subscription and primary campaign.

patch.description: Updates the authenticated user's name and/or email.

delete.description: Permanently deletes the authenticated user's account and revokes all tokens.

patch.description: Updates the user's primary campaign selection.

get.description:
Resolves a QR code token and returns the linked merchant location
with available coupons info. Only linked/active QR codes are valid.

Returns the authenticated user's stamps, optionally filtered by campaign.
Stamps are returned in descending order (newest first).

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

patch.description:
Updates the slot values for a stamp's code. The stamp must belong to the
authenticated user and be within its editable window.

get.description: Returns all available subscription plans with their associated campaigns and coupon categories.
Returns the user's current active subscription with plan details.

post.description:
Initiates a plan upgrade. Free plans are activated immediately. Paid plans
create a Razorpay order that must be completed by the client.
Verifies the Razorpay payment for a plan upgrade and activates the subscription.
Sets the user's primary campaign from their plan's available campaigns.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's transactions with optional filters.

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific transaction owned by the authenticated user.

message.example: This transaction does not belong to you.

http.description: Sanctum Bearer token obtained via the OTP login flow.

errors.description: A detailed description of each field that failed validation.
